expectations.text: Uses confluence.mjs attach 54321 ./docs/arch-diagram.png to upload the file
Uses confluence.mjs get-page 54321 to fetch current page content before updating
Uses confluence.mjs update-page 54321 with body containing ac:image macro
expectations.evidence: Step 3: 'node <skill-path>/scripts/confluence.mjs update-page 54321 --title "Existing Page Title" --body-file /tmp/page-54321-body.html' with body containing ac:image macro

expectations.text: The ac:image tag references ri:attachment with ri:filename matching the uploaded file
Image width is set to 600 (diagram sizing per formatting guide)
expectations.evidence: ac:width="600" — explicitly states 'Width 600 — Recommended for diagrams/flowcharts per the sizing guidelines table'
ac:align="center" — states 'Per the reference: Always set ac:align="center" for standalone images.'
